formula: sum(Q_source_W) + sum(Q_sink_W) over retained source/sink ledger rows; sinks carry negative sign
sign_convention: positive Q_source_side_net_W adds net heat to the modeled fluid/source-side energy ledger
basis: static retained-window source/sink boundary Q values parsed from 0/T boundary-condition contracts
release_condition: all included source/sink rows provenance-validated, source/property labels released, same-QOI neighbor windows present, same-QOI mesh/GCI accepted, and no relabeling as wall heat
